title: HCP Humanitarian Record
description: Machine-readable structural definition of a Humanitarian Record conforming to HCP-0010 Canonical JSON Specification version 0.5.

schema_version.description: Version of the Canonical JSON Specification used to represent this Humanitarian Record.

source_client.description: Technical identifier of the implementation that generated the Humanitarian Record. This field must never participate in humanitarian correlation.

recordUuid.description: Globally unique identifier of one Humanitarian Record. It identifies the record, never the observed Subject.

type.description: Type of living being referenced by the Humanitarian Observation.

reported_label.description: Human-readable label reported by the observer. It does not imply verified identity.

estimated_age.description: Approximate age of a human Subject. This field is not applicable to animal Subjects.

recognition_features.description: Concise free-text description of directly observable characteristics.
examples: Blue jacket, small black backpack, gray hair
Light brown coat, red collar, white patch on chest

event_type.description: Canonical language-independent Event Type describing what happened. Unknown future Event Types must not automatically invalidate an otherwise compatible Humanitarian Record.

reported_location.description: Free-text description of where the Humanitarian Observation occurred.

reported_by.description: Humanitarian source that reported the Observation.

public_contact.description: Optional communication channel voluntarily provided for humanitarian communication. It must never participate in correlation.
